This article applies to selling in: **United States**

# Local Selling Program Policies

Sign in to use the tool and get personalized help (desktop browser required).

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/sign-in?use_default_idp&redirect_to=%2Fhelp%2Fhub%2Freference%2Fexternal%2FGALGRJ45NC438BPK)

On this page

[Buyer-seller communication policy](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK#mnd_2jc_jcb__section_glb_xk5_xrb)

[Payment acceptance policy](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK#mnd_2jc_jcb__section_zj3_cl5_xrb)

[Payment acceptance policy](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK#mnd_2jc_jcb__section_zj3_cl5_xrb)

[Changes to Local Selling performance targets](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK#mnd_2jc_jcb__section_rmc_wl5_xrb)

[Unscheduled or unattended Local Delivery](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK#mnd_2jc_jcb__section_rzn_xl5_xrb)

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)

As a seller participating in the Local Selling program, you must comply with the [Local Selling terms](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/GUGFQ9HS2JBLN7XZ) and follow these guidelines to ensure a safe and ideal experience for customers. Failure to comply with these policies may result in a warning, suspension of your orders, or termination of your Local Selling privileges.

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)
## Buyer-seller communication policy

Unless we inform you in writing that you are exempt from this policy, you can only contact a customer by using an Amazon communication channel such as buyer-seller messaging or an Amazon selling app. You may not use customer personal data or an Amazon communication channel to contact customers in any way for marketing or promotional purposes, or for reasons unrelated to order fulfillment.

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)
## Payment acceptance policy

You will ensure all payments (including refunds and discounts) for Local Product orders are initiated and processed through Amazon.com.

If we determine that you or your personnel circumvent this policy, we may withhold any payments to you until the completion of any related investigation, or recover any amounts owed to customers or Amazon by any method provided in your [Amazon Services Business Solutions Agreement](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/1791) (the "Seller Agreement").

For more information, go to [Appeal an account deactivation or listing removal](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/G200370560).

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)
## Changes to Local Selling performance targets

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)
## Changes to Local Selling performance targets

Amazon may modify the [Local Selling performance targets](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/200205250) over time. Any changes will be posted on Seller Central.

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)
## Unscheduled or unattended Local Delivery

For any Local Product for which you offer delivery within a Local Selling region, standard performance metrics will apply as defined in [Monitor your account health status](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/200205250).

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)
## Local Selling optional services

[](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/help/hub/reference/external/GALGRJ45NC438BPK)
## Local Selling optional services

For any Local Product for which you offer an attached service, you will comply with the terms, definitions, and policies for Amazon Service Providers, as detailed in the [Selling services terms](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/G201484410), the [Amazon services providers program policies](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/G9GPDWV663AD4USD), and the [Account management and performance targets for services](https://sellercentral.amazon.com/gp/help/external/202043250).
